examples: They held back the crowd with barriers.
His fear held him back from applying.
Lack of education held her back.
Nothing will hold us back now.
The dam holds back the water.
The injury held back his career.
He held back his anger during the meeting.
Don't hold back — tell me the truth.
She couldn't hold back her tears.
Don't let anything hold you back.
example_translate: Его страх удержал его от подачи заявки.
Он сдерживал гнев во время встречи.
hold back.synonyms:
Сдерживать, удерживать - restrain, hold, control
Замедлять, препятствовать прогрессу - hinder, delay, impede
